민수기 12:1.content: Miriam and Aaron spoke against Moses because of the Cushite woman whom he had married; for he had married a Cushite woman.

민수기 12:2.content: They said, “Has Yahweh indeed spoken only with Moses? Hasn’t he spoken also with us?” And Yahweh heard it.

민수기 12:3.content: Now the man Moses was very humble, more than all the men who were on the surface of the earth.

민수기 12:4.content: Yahweh spoke suddenly to Moses, to Aaron, and to Miriam, “You three come out to the Tent of Meeting!” The three of them came out.

민수기 12:5.content: Yahweh came down in a pillar of cloud, and stood at the door of the Tent, and called Aaron and Miriam; and they both came forward.

민수기 12:6.content: He said, “Now hear my words. If there is a prophet among you, I, Yahweh, will make myself known to him in a vision. I will speak with him in a dream.

민수기 12:7.content: My servant Moses is not so. He is faithful in all my house.

민수기 12:8.content: With him, I will speak mouth to mouth, even plainly, and not in riddles; and he shall see Yahweh’s form. Why then were you not afraid to speak against my servant, against Moses?”

민수기 12:9.content: Yahweh’s anger burned against them; and he departed.

민수기 12:10.content: The cloud departed from over the Tent; and behold, Miriam was leprous, as white as snow. Aaron looked at Miriam, and behold, she was leprous.

민수기 12:11.content: Aaron said to Moses, “Oh, my lord, please don’t count this sin against us, in which we have done foolishly, and in which we have sinned.

민수기 12:12.content: Let her not, I pray, be as one dead, of whom the flesh is half consumed when he comes out of his mother’s womb.”

민수기 12:13.content: Moses cried to Yahweh, saying, “Heal her, God, I beg you!”

민수기 12:14.content: Yahweh said to Moses, “If her father had but spit in her face, shouldn’t she be ashamed seven days? Let her be shut up outside of the camp seven days, and after that she shall be brought in again.”

민수기 12:15.content: Miriam was shut up outside of the camp seven days, and the people didn’t travel until Miriam was brought in again.

민수기 12:16.content: Afterward the people traveled from Hazeroth, and encamped in the wilderness of Paran.
